summary: Supplier Dashboard feature testing COMPLETE. All backend APIs functional (15/15 tests passed). All frontend features working: Overview, Transfers, Bookings, Earnings tabs, supplier selector, booking status workflow.

minor.issue: Was returning 500 due to MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue - FIXED by cleaning response data

issues: React hydration warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <select>' - cosmetic issue from dynamic rendering, does not affect functionality

supplier_selector.dropdown_works: PASS - Shows all 4 suppliers (Emirates, Georgia, VIP Cars, Budget Shuttles)
supplier_selector.switch_suppliers: PASS - Dashboard refreshes with new supplier data

overview_tab.stats_display: PASS - Shows Total Transfers, Total Bookings, Total Earnings, Completed count
overview_tab.recent_activity: PASS - Shows recent bookings with status badges

transfers_tab.displays_transfers: PASS - Shows supplier's transfers with type, vehicle, cost, sale price
transfers_tab.edit_modal_opens: PASS - Edit button visible on hover, modal opens
transfers_tab.edit_modal_fields: PASS - Duration, Confirmation Time, Pick-up Times, Description, Available checkbox

bookings_tab.accept_button: PASS - Visible and functional for pending bookings
bookings_tab.reject_button: PASS - Visible and functional for pending bookings

earnings_tab.earnings_overview: PASS - Shows Total Earnings, Pending Earnings, Completed Bookings
earnings_tab.earnings_by_transfer: PASS - Breakdown by transfer with booking count and earnings

generate_sample_bookings.button_visible: PASS - Shows when no bookings exist
generate_sample_bookings.creates_bookings: PASS - Creates test bookings via API

critical_code_review_comments: Console warning about React hydration (<span> in <select>) is a cosmetic issue that doesn't affect functionality
Code properly excludes MongoDB _id from all API responses
Supplier authorization properly validates transfer ownership before updates
seed_data_creation: Sample bookings created via 'Generate Sample Bookings' button for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Supplier Dashboard is fully functional. Available suppliers: Emirates Transfers LLC, Georgia Tours Co., VIP Cars Dubai, Budget Shuttles LLC. Use supplier dropdown to switch. Booking status workflow: pending -> confirm -> complete. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_supplier.py
